posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that Facebook Leads have now been added to Data Importer - a dedicated integration app build specifically for monday.

A few things that makes our integration special:

  • You can import leads collected both Facebook and Instagram.

  • You can import all your fields from the lead form - including custom fields.

  • You can schedule your import to run automatically so that leads are constantly being added to your monday board.

I’ve also created a step-by-step tutorial for more details on how to import Facebook Leads into monday.

Screenshot 2024-11-06 at 20.56.151348×1016 47.7 KB
